theme: quieting a skyscraper with a handful of shock absorbers
title: Seating Chart for Shock Absorbers
strategies: antinode concentration (trap/baseline): pour every unit onto the floors with the largest fundamental-mode amplitude; over-damps the slow mode until it detaches and creeps back toward the imaginary axis, and starves every other mode
uniform spread (obvious recipe): distribute the units evenly across all floors; balanced but wastes budget on already-quiet modes and never targets the least-damped one

spectral-abscissa coordinate ascent (insight): treat -max Re(lambda) as a nonsmooth minimax over the mode family; repeatedly identify the currently rightmost (least-damped) eigenmode, use its eigenvector to rank each floor's marginal effect on that mode's decay, and shift a unit toward the best floor, verifying against the true state matrix
full local search / annealing over unit moves (headroom above strong): exchange moves scored directly by the recomputed decay margin can push past the coordinate-ascent local optimum
